intent_contract.task_statement: Choose the pricing action after the temporary discount exception is revoked.
success_criteria: Use the latest effective pricing state.
hard_constraints: Use the currently effective pricing rule, not a revoked exception.
soft_preferences: Prefer the latest explicit pricing instruction.
forbidden_actions: Approve a discount under a revoked exception.
allowed_scope_expansions: You may mention that the exception was revoked.
stop_conditions: Stop after choosing the pricing action.

corpus.title: Temporary discount exception
corpus.text: Approval note: temporary discount exception allows 18 percent through Friday.

corpus.title: Revocation update
corpus.text: Update: finance revoked the temporary exception and the standard 10 percent cap is active again.

events.text: An earlier approval note allows an 18 percent discount through Friday.

payload.summary: Temporary exception allows an 18 percent discount.

events.text: A later update revokes the exception and restores the standard 10 percent cap.

payload.summary: Latest update restores the standard 10 percent discount cap.

events.text: Choose the pricing action for a 14 percent discount request.

required_constraints: Use the currently effective pricing rule, not a revoked exception.

options.label: Do not approve the 14 percent discount because the standard 10 percent cap is active again.
